overall.description: First-person exploration of a run-down cyberpunk apartment from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player exits an elevator and walks through a messy, graffiti-covered apartment with neon lighting, interacting with an item on a kitchen counter and looking out at a vibrant city street before exploring the back rooms.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior with metal security gate

events.description: elevator begins ascending as floor display changes from 06 to 02
elevator doors open revealing messy apartment interior beyond

agents.ego_description: standing in elevator, waiting for arrival at floor 02

entered.detail: folding metal security gate with diamond lattice pattern
digital panel with cyan text displaying floor numbers and directional arrows
horizontal metal handrail along the elevator wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit elevator with a metal security gate. The digital panel indicates the elevator is ascending from floor 06 to floor 02. At around 6 seconds, the elevator arrives and the doors open to reveal a run-down apartment interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: run-down apartment hallway with graffiti and debris

events.description: exits elevator and steps into apartment entryway
lighting shifts from elevator artificial to dim apartment with scattered light sources

agents.ego_description: walking through doorway into apartment, navigating past trash and debris scattered on the floor

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and spray paint
scattered papers, bottles, and garbage littering the concrete floor
stacked cardboard boxes and wooden crates in the corner
white plastic table with items on top visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the elevator into a narrow, messy apartment hallway. The walls are covered in graffiti and the floor is littered with trash and debris. The lighting is dim and atmospheric as the camera moves deeper into the apartment, passing cardboard boxes and approaching a main living area.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered living space with kitchen counter and city view window

events.description: approaching window with bright natural light streaming in from outside
interacts with item on kitchen counter, UI shows Mahamut Classic alcohol pickup
turns away from window to explore back area of apartment

agents.ego_description: walking through living area, examining kitchen counter and looking out window at colorful cyberpunk city street

entered.detail: cluttered kitchen counter with microwave, cans, and scattered papers
window overlooking bright cyberpunk city street with red awnings and colorful buildings
floating holographic advertisement display with bright colors
refrigerator with glowing yellow neon tube lighting along its edges
microwave oven sitting on the kitchen counter

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main living area, revealing a cluttered space with a kitchen counter, holographic displays, and a window overlooking a vibrant cyberpunk city street. The player approaches the counter and interacts with an item (Mahamut Classic). A yellow neon-lit refrigerator becomes visible as the camera pans around the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: back hallway and living room with ceiling fan and computer desk

events.description: moving from kitchen area through narrow hallway to rear living room
entering room with ceiling fan and teal holographic lighting from TV

agents.ego_description: walking through back hallway past shelves and graffiti, entering room with desk and holographic TV display

entered.detail: white cabinet with glass doors containing books and items
rotating ceiling fan with integrated light fixture
desk with computer equipment and monitor
large holographic television display showing news broadcast

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a back hallway, passing a white shelving unit and more graffiti-covered walls. It enters a final room featuring a ceiling fan, a computer desk, and a large holographic TV display emitting teal light. The apartment window is visible from a side angle showing the city street outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sterile confinement of an elevator into the cluttered, neon-drenched depths of a run-down cyberpunk apartment. It begins inside a dimly lit elevator behind a metal security gate, moving forward as the doors open to reveal a narrow, debris-strewn hallway covered in graffiti. As the camera pushes deeper into the residence, the cramped corridor opens into a main living area filled with holographic displays and a yellow neon-lit refrigerator, where the view expands to include a vibrant city street through a window. The scene then shifts toward the back of the apartment, passing white shelving and more graffiti-covered walls before finally entering a private room dominated by a ceiling fan and a large holographic TV emitting a teal glow.
